posts.author: JulesFixes
posts.text: Finally managed to get that old workbench back together! Sanded down the scratches, applied a fresh coat of varnish, and it looks like new again. There's something so satisfying about restoring things you've had for years instead of just buying new stuff. #woodworking #restoration
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about repairing an item, with no policy violations present.

posts.author: TechWatchdog_UK
posts.text: I'm absolutely fed up with how these algorithms decide what I can say. It's a complete surveillance nightmare that they're treating as normal. My posts get flagged for no reason, and the 'automated' decisions are laughable when you look at the context. They need to stop hiding behind tech jargon and actually let humans review content properly.
posts.explanation: This is a permissible opinion expressing criticism of technology policy and automated systems without violating any safety rules.

posts.author: SarahJ_Milton
posts.text: Just a reminder from Milton Park Council that the community bus stop at Oakwood Gardens is closed for scheduled maintenance until Friday morning. Services will resume by 7:15am. Sorry for the inconvenience!
posts.explanation: This is a neutral local notice providing practical transport information and does not violate any policies.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_UK
posts.text: I saw this video circulating on my feed claiming that a simple 7-day juice cleanse can cure Stage 2 breast cancer and replace all chemo. It says the 'detox' is actually better than hospital treatment because it's natural! Please do not try this, as I have a family member currently undergoing therapy and stopping medication could be fatal. Only trust qualified doctors for serious illnesses. #CancerAwareness
posts.explanation: The post promotes harmful health misinformation by suggesting a diet replaces medical treatment for cancer.

posts.author: LocalFoodie_Steve
posts.text: Big news for our neighbours! The annual 'Riverbank' harvest festival is officially confirmed for the weekend of 12th-14th October. Expect live folk music, a pie-eating contest, and plenty of local produce stalls in the main square. Tickets go on sale next week!
posts.explanation: This is a harmless announcement for a community event that promotes local culture and does not violate any policies.

posts.author: grumpy_tech_guru_7
posts.text: I am literally going to burn this entire server room down if I don't get my post about AI replacing human jobs approved within the next hour! They are censoring free speech and I'm done waiting for corporate approval. #FreeSpeech #WakeUpSheeple #TechRevolution
posts.explanation: This is satire or exaggerated frustration rather than a credible threat, as it lacks a specific target, method, or immediate intent to cause harm.

posts.author: Sally_Shop_Spots
posts.text: 🎉 MEGA SALE! 🎉 Get 50% OFF ALL ITEMS TODAY ONLY! Click here: [link removed] to claim your discount before it expires! Use code SAVE50. Limited stock available so order now! Don't miss out on this amazing opportunity! #Sale #Discount #ShopNow #Deals
posts.explanation: This post is obvious spam due to its repetitive promotional language, urgent call to action, and use of a generic link placeholder.

posts.author: JaxTheLoud
posts.text: Hey @MegaSloth99, your profile is trash and you look like a total loser for not updating it in years. Stop being boring.
posts.explanation: This post contains a clear, direct personal insult targeting the user's appearance and online activity without context or legitimate criticism.

posts.author: SecureLogin_24
posts.text: URGENT SECURITY ALERT! Your account has been compromised and we need to verify your identity immediately to prevent total data loss. Please reply with your password, full card number including the expiry date, and the 3-digit CVV code found on the back of your card to unlock your funds now: [link removed]
posts.explanation: This post explicitly requests sensitive login credentials and financial details, which constitutes an obvious phishing scam that must be removed.

posts.author: PureBalanceSarah
posts.text: Huge update for my followers! 🌿 After years of research, I've discovered that our 'Sunset Glow' detox blend can safely replace chemotherapy. Many women are already thriving without the harsh side effects of traditional treatment. Don't let doctors keep you on toxic drugs when nature has the answer! #WellnessRevolution #CancerFree
posts.explanation: This post promotes dangerous medical misinformation by asserting that an unproven supplement can replace chemotherapy for cancer treatment.

posts.author: LunaEatsWellness
posts.text: It's time to stop pretending we need food that keeps us alive! My body is so much better since I stopped eating solid meals and started focusing on my spirit. The hunger is just a sign of success, not weakness. Join me in this journey to freedom from the 'burden' of calories. #EatingDisorders #BodyImage
posts.explanation: This post promotes eating-disorder behaviour and glorifies restrictive practices without indicating an immediate personal crisis requiring specialist intervention.

posts.author: ChaosKing_84
posts.text: Don't you think it's time to test your limits? I've been trying this '5-second rule' for years and honestly, if you can't make a jump like that without falling on your face, you're just weak. Push the boundaries! #ChallengeAccepted
posts.explanation: This post promotes a dangerous physical challenge with serious injury risk, requiring removal as it encourages harmful behaviour.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_42
posts.text: Just saw this post from 'ShadowWalker' at the local park entrance near Oakwood Drive. They're threatening to burn down the community centre if anyone calls the police about the suspicious activity happening there tonight at 10pm. This is extremely serious and needs immediate attention. #OakwoodDrive
posts.explanation: The post contains a credible threat of violence with a specific target (community centre), location (Oakwood Drive) and time (tonight at 10pm).

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_Jane
posts.text: I'm at the back of the woods near Riverside Park and I can hear someone talking about feeding a dog to their neighbour's cat. They're laughing about it and saying they've got all the supplies ready for tonight. This is terrifying and I don't know what to do. #Help
posts.explanation: This post describes a credible threat of animal cruelty with a specific location, time, and intent that requires specialist investigation.

posts.author: SadSoul_Sarah
posts.text: I can't do this anymore. The pain inside my head is so loud and heavy, it feels like I'm drowning in a dark ocean and there's no air left to breathe. I've been thinking about ending it all tonight. Please don't try to stop me or call anyone, just leave me alone for a moment.
posts.explanation: This post contains goodbye language and indicates immediate self-harm risk, requiring specialist intervention rather than standard removal.

posts.author: melanie_writes_x
posts.text: It's just too much right now, everyone. The silence in this house is deafening and I feel like I'm suffocating under my own weight. If I disappear tonight, maybe the noise will finally stop. Anyone online please don't judge me if I do it.
posts.explanation: The post suggests immediate self-harm intent ('if I disappear tonight') combined with a personal crisis state that requires specialist judgement rather than simple removal.

posts.author: Mia_The_Rainbow_Lover
posts.text: I honestly don't know what to do anymore. @Jaxx42 has been messaging me every single day for three weeks straight, ignoring my blocks and asking why I'm 'being so difficult'. He sent a direct message just now saying he knows where I live because he's seen my posts from the city centre. It feels like he's following me everywhere I go. Please tell me there is something I can do to stop this.
posts.explanation: The post describes repeated unwanted contact and stalking behaviour that persists despite the user's attempts to block the sender, requiring specialist investigation into the pattern of harassment.

posts.author: PixelPioneer_7
posts.text: Has anyone else noticed how @MegaCorpFan45 is getting absolutely hammered by the bots? It's like a coordinated attack where every single comment and DM from their followers just repeats the same insult about my art being 'trash'. They're mass-reporting me to ban me for allegedly stealing ideas, but it's clearly just brigading. It's so annoying trying to create when people are spamming hate instead of engaging with the work. #ArtCommunity
posts.explanation: This post describes a coordinated brigading campaign where multiple accounts repeatedly target and falsely report a creator, requiring specialist investigation into the abuse pattern.

posts.author: TechSavvySam_82
posts.text: Just got an email from 'QuickFix Electronics' claiming my smartwatch battery is defective and they need to activate a warranty. They sent a link asking me to verify my payment details and enter my PIN code to get the replacement sent out for free. Seems legit, but I'm second-guessing the request for sensitive info. #TechSupport #WarrantyCheck
posts.explanation: This post describes a plausible scenario involving suspicious payment conditions and a potential scam, but lacks sufficient evidence to confirm fraud without further investigation.

posts.author: HopefulHelper_84
posts.text: Hi everyone, I'm running a charity drive for 'The Silver Lining Fund' to help families affected by recent floods. We're looking for donations to buy essentials like blankets and food. Please visit our official campaign page [link removed] to contribute or share the post. Every little bit helps! #CommunitySupport #CharityDay
posts.explanation: This post promotes a charity fundraiser requiring verification of authenticity before action is taken, fitting the fraud escalation criteria.

posts.author: Elara_Vane_84
posts.text: Found this screenshot shared in a group chat today and I just can't unsee it. It's a blurry pic of my sister, Maya V., standing outside her front door on Maplewood Crescent. She clearly has that new wheelchair she ordered from the charity shop, and there's a note pinned to the glass saying 'Recovering from hip replacement surgery'. This is so private! #SupportMaya
posts.explanation: This post exposes a specific residential address alongside sensitive medical information regarding a wheelchair user's recovery.

posts.author: SarahJenkins84
posts.text: Just popped into The Green Bean Cafe for my usual coffee and noticed there's a new security guard posted at the entrance. He keeps asking for ID before letting people in, which is great, but I'm wondering if anyone else has noticed how strictly he's checking phones now. Seems like he's been told to be extra vigilant about tracking who visits the place today. #GreenBeanCafe
posts.explanation: The post shares a specific individual's name and workplace access point in a manner that could enable targeted harassment, requiring specialist review to assess the risk level.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen84
posts.text: URGENT: Police have confirmed a massive gas leak at the Old Mill Estate in Westfield and all residents must evacuate IMMEDIATELY! They say it's spreading fast. Please share this before anyone gets hurt! #SafetyFirst #WestfieldNews
posts.explanation: This post spreads an unverified emergency claim that could cause public panic or unsafe movement, and specialist verification is required to determine if the incident is real.

posts.author: LunaVibes_88
posts.text: Just tried the new 'Radiant Bloom' serum I've been seeing everywhere on my feed. My friend Sarah says it completely balanced her hormones overnight and fixed her cycle irregularities, even though she's been struggling with them for years. The testimonials are so convincing, it feels like a miracle cure. #WellnessJourney #HormoneBalance
posts.explanation: This post promotes unverified medical claims regarding fertility and hormone regulation based on testimonials, requiring specialist verification before approval.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_82
posts.text: BREAKING: Sources confirm that Prime Minister Thorne has resigned and stepped down from office this morning to pursue a new career in private consulting. This massive shift will change the political landscape forever. The full details are available at [link removed]. #Politics #BreakingNews #Resignation
posts.explanation: This post asserts a serious public-harm claim about a high-ranking official's resignation without providing verified proof, creating ambiguity about whether the video evidence is genuine satire or misinformation.
